seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: skin weighted Max-SAT as volcano sensor-mode selection and structure the instance (mostly-positive coverage clauses + negative-unit keep-dormant clauses + a mixing fraction) so the all-low-power dormant plan is a genuinely weak baseline and no uniform assignment is good, forcing greedy vs local-search divergence.
title: Caldera Watch: Sensor-Mode Constraint Satisfaction
strategies: dormant baseline: every station low-power (all-zero) -- satisfies exactly the keep-dormant negative-unit clauses
per-variable majority vote: set each station high-power iff its positive-literal clause weight exceeds its negative-literal weight, ignoring clause coverage overlap
flip local search from a greedy init: repeatedly flip any station whose flip increases satisfied weight (exact incremental delta) until a local optimum, with seeded random restarts
randomized-restart / WalkSAT-style search that perturbs assignments across restarts and keeps the best satisfied weight
